title: by Amazon Disney Pure Baby Wipes, 100% Plant Based Fibres, 99% Water, 720 Wipes, Unscented, 12 pack of 60, (Previously a Mama Bear brand, same product)
features: Packaging may vary from images shown. This product was previously a Mama Bear product. Now it’s a part of the by Amazon brand. The product is the exact same formulations, size, quality and the supplier is the same.
100% PLANT BASED: Made from 100% plant based fibres
MULTI-BENEFIT PACK: 12 packs; 60 water-based wipes per pack
DERMATOLOGICALLY AND PAEDIATRICIAN APPROVED: Skin pH balanced
HYPOALLERGENIC: Formulation developed to minimise allergic potential
FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: Formulated with mild and gentle ingredients for sensitive, newborn and delicate skin
VERSATILE: Suitable for hands, feet and nappy area
With all the fun and excitement of your favourite Disney characters
description: Product Description An Amazon Brand Ingredients AQUA, SODIUM BENZOATE, MYRISTAMIDOPROPYL PG-DIMONIUM CHLORIDE PHOSPHATE, CITRIC ACID, SODIUM GLUCONATE, SODIUM CITRATE Directions Pull back label and remove wipe. Use as required, reseal label after use to keep the wipes moist. Do not flush. Keep wipes and packaging out of the reach of babies and children. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children and babies. Avoid direct contact with eyes. If this does occur, rinse well with water. External use only. Box Contains Each box contains 12 packs, with 60 wipes in each pack (720 wipes in total). See more
